summary: Policy templates + live hosting_accounts drive routing. Customer subdomains are not stored here — they are generated when accounts are active.

zero_naming.not: A single zero hostname on the OPNsense gateway IP

dns_precedence: Unbound: specific host (dev) beats wildcard (*). Hosting subdomains on wildcard zones use * for prod; dev always needs explicit override.
provision_order: OPNsense Unbound (only if dev, apex, or non-wildcard zone)

policy_rules.label: Production wildcard (CSC LAN)
policy_rules.notes: Shared prod subdomains (coop.csc, etc.) use this — no per-site Unbound row needed.

policy_rules.label: Dev Comserv (must beat wildcard)
policy_rules.notes: Unbound → gateway :80; HAProxy forwards to workstation Starman :3001 (no :3001 in URL).

policy_rules.label: Dev BeeMaster
policy_rules.notes: Verify audit: must resolve to workstation not production.

policy_rules.label: ZeroTier entry — CSC (public)
policy_rules.notes: Per-domain zero hostname in Application DNS.

tool_roles.role: Source of customer hostnames (dynamic rules at runtime)
Site + Cloudflare + gateway Unbound on approve
LAN DNS — dev overrides and non-wildcard zones only
Public DNS for all customer subdomains
WAN HTTPS termination and health failover
Flags wildcard shadowing, wrong IPs, missing SiteDomain
